title: Constant Contact vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Customer.io: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Customer.io?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Customer.io?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
